converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
First Unitarian Society of Ithaca (N.Y.) records
First Unitarian Society of Ithaca (N.Y.)
4590
19.3 cubic feet.
1861-2018 Constitutions, board minutes, correspondence, financial records, and other records. Constitutions, board minutes, correspondence, financial records, and numerous other records of the church. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 15 16 14 17 (unprocessed) 18 (unprocessed) 19 (unprocessed) 20 (unprocessed) ======= 15 16 14 17 (unprocessed) 18 (unprocessed) 19 (unprocessed) 20 (unprocessed) >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 2248591
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Kari Smith et al.
Date completed:
June 2004
EAD encoding:
Martin Heggestad, June 2004
Date modified:
Marcie Farwell, May 2018
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Constitutions, board minutes, correspondence, financial records, and numerous other records of the church.
Cite As:
First Unitarian Church of Ithaca, New York records, #4590. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Access Restrictions:
Access to Box 14 (donor records) is restricted.
Ithaca (N.Y.) -- Religious life and customs. Unitarians -- New York (State) -- Ithaca. First Unitarian Society of Ithaca (N.Y.)
